hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '(/graphql/[^/]+\.graphqls|/controller/[^/]+\.java|/router/[^/]+\.java|/routes/[^/]+\.java|/api-gateway/src/main/resources/application[^/]*\.(yml|yaml))$' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"API contract file changed -- update postman/ecommerce.postman_collection.json to reflect any new, removed, or modified endpoints."}}'; } 2>/dev/null || true
